summary: Internal AMK review scaffold for a movie or trailer slice. No generated media, no provider calls, no public release in this phase.

story_concept.title: Story concept
amk_input_prompts: What is the one-sentence logline?
What change does the protagonist undergo by the end of the trailer arc?
What genre promise must the trailer keep without misleading the feature?
What is explicitly out of scope for this trailer versus the full film?
checklist: No uncited factual claims in on-screen text
No comparative superiority without evidence
No AGI positioning, uncapped capability claims, or outcome guarantees in copy

world_bible.title: World bible (trailer scope)
amk_input_prompts: What rules of the world must the audience grasp in under ninety seconds?
What locations, eras, or factions appear in the trailer only?
What must stay mysterious for the feature?
checklist: References to real groups or events are reviewed for fairness and risk
Fantasy violence level aligned to intended rating intent

character_roles.title: Character roles (trailer)
amk_input_prompts: Which characters appear in the trailer and why?
Who is the audience surrogate?
Any composite or fictionalized real persons? Document posture.
checklist: No real-person likeness without consent and counsel where applicable
Child or youth portrayal triggers child or privacy review path if applicable

trailer_structure.title: Trailer structure
amk_input_prompts: Target runtime band (teaser versus theatrical trailer)?
Single-spine or parallel threads in this cut?
Title card and end-tag strategy?
checklist: Structure matches honest product (film or series) positioning
No bait-and-switch on tone or rating

scene_beats.title: Scene beats
amk_input_prompts: List 8–14 beats with approximate duration notes.
Which beats rely on borrowed score or temp track? Mark for replacement.
checklist: Each beat has a rights note: original, licensed, or clearance TBD
No uncleared news or third-party footage

shot_list.title: Shot list
amk_input_prompts: For each hero shot: lens intent, movement, and emotional job.
VFX or stock dependency per shot?
checklist: Stock and VFX sources logged before external screeners
Stunt or sensitive action flagged for specialist review if needed

visual_style_guide.title: Visual style guide
amk_input_prompts: Primary palette and contrast intent (theatrical versus mobile-first)?
Typography and title treatment ownership?
Reference films for mood only — not for frame theft.
checklist: Style guide describes intent; does not grant IP to mimic protected artists without permission
Logos and third-party marks usage cleared or avoided

music_sound_brief.title: Music and sound brief
amk_input_prompts: Temp track policy: internal only until licensed or original score path chosen?
Dialogue-to-music balance and loudness targets?
Sound design motifs that carry meaning for accessibility?
checklist: Music brief is not a license — rights review before any public sync
No uncleared samples in any externalised cut

poster_key_art_brief.title: Poster and key-art brief
amk_input_prompts: Single hero image concept and safe margin for title?
Formats: one-sheet, digital 16:9, social crops?
Talent billing and contractual order requirements?
checklist: Poster brief does not generate art — commission or design lane is separate
Billing and trademark lines reviewed before print or paid social

accessibility_and_sensory_notes.title: Accessibility and sensory notes
amk_input_prompts: Flashing or strobing risk? Seizure-safe cut plan?
Meaning carried by audio alone — captions plan?
Intensity or trauma themes — content warnings for marketing?
checklist: Accessibility notes feed engineering and mastering checklists; not a substitute for platform policy review

safety_rights_checklist.title: Safety and rights checklist
amk_input_prompts: Attach clearance log links or file IDs when known.
List any pending unknowns explicitly.
checklist: Rights posture is original or permission required — no silent assumption
Public or paid placement blocked until AMK and counsel where required

review_questions_for_amk.title: Review questions for AMK
amk_input_prompts: Does this trailer honestly represent the feature?
Are all superlatives evidenced or removed?
Are minors or sensitive populations treated per policy?
Is any pricing, donation, or commercial CTA attached? If yes, route Z-SUSBV and entitlement review.
outline_placeholders: AMK decision: approve internal pack only — [date]
AMK decision: open public screener lane — [blocked until gate]
checklist: Indicator and bundle are advisory — AMK opens public release
No deploy, upload, or provider calls from this artefact

forbidden_actions: mimic protected living artists without permission
call external AI or media APIs
auto-merge trailer assets to production branches
required_human_gates: Rights or IP review before public use
Child or privacy review if minors or youth content involved
